reviews.comment:
Muy lindo, renovado. No deja de ser un motel de ruta, pera agradable. Es una excelente opcion de paso.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice, recently renovated. It's still a roadside motel, but a pleasant one. It's an excellent option for a stopover.
